oathauth-secret: Furaha sirta ah ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo:
oathauth-recoverycodes-important: Tallaabadani waa muhiim! Ha ka boodin tallaabadan!
oathauth-recoverycodes-neveragain: Koodhadhkan mar dambe lama muujin doono!
oathauth-recoverytokens-createdat: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waa la sameeyay: $1
oathauth-recoverycodes-copy-success: Koodhadhka soo kabashada waxaa lagu koobiyeeyay sabuuraddaada!
oathauth-validatedoath: Xogta xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo waa la xaqiijiyay. Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo hadda waa la dhaqan gelin doonaa.
oathauth-noscratchforvalidation: Ma isticmaali kartid koodh soo kabasho si aad u xaqiijiso xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo. Koodhadhka soo kabashada waxaa loo isticmaalaa kaliya kayd iyo xaalado gaar ah. Fadlan isticmaal koodh ka yimid barnaamijkaaga xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo (sida [https://www.authy.com/ Authy], [https://freeotp.github.io/ FreeOTP], [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/1066447 Google Authenticator], [https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/mobile-authenticator-app Microsoft Authenticator] ama [https://1password.com/ 1Password]).
oathauth-step2alt: Haddii aadan awoodin inaad sawirto QR code-ka, gacanta ku geli furaha sirta ah iyo magaca xisaabta:
oathauth-entertoken: Geli koodh ka yimid qalabkaaga xaqiijinta si loo xaqiijiyo:
oathauth-verify-for-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
right-oathauth-verify-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
action-oathauth-verify-user: Hubi in isticmaale uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
oathauth-disable-intro: Awood weyn, waxaa la socota masuuliyad weyn
oathauth-auth-token-help: Eray sir ah oo hal mar la isticmaalo oo loo adeegsado sidii qodobka labaad ee xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
grant-group-authentication: Samee falalka xaqiijinta naftaada iyo kuwa kale
grant-oath: Hel xogta xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo (OATH) ee naftaada iyo kuwa kale
oathauth-user-not-found: Lama helin xisaab isticmaale oo leh magacaas
oath-log-header: Dhacdooyinkan waxay la socdaan isbeddellada xaaladda xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaalayaasha.
logentry-oath-verify: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuu hubiyay}} in $3 uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa
log-action-filter-oath-verify: Hubinaya in xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ay shaqaynayso
log-action-filter-oath-disable-other: Daminaya xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ee isticmaale kale
oathauth-invalid-data-format: Bixiyaha xogta ma ansaxayo si loo abuuro furaha habka xaqiijinta ee la doortay
oathauth-totp-description: Habka Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) waa kordhin ka mid ah habka HMAC-based One-Time Password (HOTP), kaas oo soo saara eray-sir hal mar la isticmaalo adigoo ka dhigaya mid gaar ah waqtiga hadda.
notification-header-oathauth-remove-devi: Qalab xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah ayaa laga saaray {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}}.
notification-body-oathauth-disable: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan tan samayn, {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} waxaa laga yaabaa in la jabsaday.
notification-body-oathauth-disable-other: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan codsan tan, {{GENDER:$2|waa inaad}} la xiriirtaa maamule.
notification-body-oathauth-disable-remai: Weli {{PLURAL:$3|wuu jiraa qalab dheeraad ah|waxaa jira $3 qalab oo dheeraad ah}} oo ku xiran {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}}.
notification-body-oathauth-enable: Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} aadan tan samayn, {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} waxaa laga yaabaa in la jabsaday.
notification-header-oathauth-recoverycod: {{GENDER:$2|Adigu}} waa inaad dib ugu diiwaangelisaa {{GENDER:$2|xisaabtaada}} xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo.
oathauth-verify-enabled: {{GENDER:$1|$1}} waxa uu leeyahay xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa.
oathauth-verify-disabled: {{GENDER:$1|$1}} ma haysto xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo oo shaqaynaysa.
oathauth-qrcode-alt: QR code la iska akhriyi karo oo matalaya furaha sirta ah.
oathauth-error-multiple-modules: Waqtigan xaadirka ah, lama taageero isticmaalka habab badan oo xaqiijin laba-tallaabo ah. Waxaad kaliya awood u yeelan kartaa $1 ka dib marka aad damiso $2.
